news.title: Samsung confirms to launch AI smart glasses in 2026
news.summary: Samsung has confirmed its plans to launch AI smart glasses in 2026, featuring a multimodal AI experience with voice, vision, and sensors.
news.content: Samsung's EVP of Mobile Experiences, Seong Cho, confirmed the company's plans to launch wearable devices, including AR glasses, in 2026 during the Q4 2025 earnings call. The new glasses are designed to work with AI assistants and sensors rather than full mixed-reality displays, aiming to provide intuitive AI support for daily tasks.

news.title: Apple plans to launch AI smart glasses by the end of 2026
news.summary: Apple is accelerating the development of its first smart glasses, targeting a late 2026 release to compete with Meta Ray-Ban smart glasses.
news.content: The device is expected to include built-in cameras, microphones, and speakers, supporting voice commands via Siri and performing tasks such as handling phone calls, playing music, translating languages in real time, and offering navigation. Apple engineers are preparing to begin large-scale prototype production with overseas suppliers later this year.

news.title: Apple's Vision Products Group leads the development of AI smart glasses
news.summary: Apple's smart glasses project is being led by the Vision Products Group, which is also working on a lighter version of the headset that can be connected to a Mac.
news.content: The smart glasses project at Apple is being led by the Vision Products Group, which previously developed the Vision Pro headset. The team is currently working on a lighter version of the headset that can be connected to a Mac. Apple is also gearing up to launch its first foldable phone by the end of 2026 and intends to open up its large language model API to encourage the growth of the App Store AI ecosystem.

news.title: Google collaborates with Samsung on AI smart glasses development
news.summary: Google is working with Samsung to develop AI smart glasses, scheduled for launch in 2026, focusing on daily utility and communication.
news.content: Google has confirmed that its first AI smart glasses will debut in 2026, marking a major expansion of its Android XR ecosystem. The glasses are designed to integrate seamlessly into everyday routines, allowing users to ask questions about their surroundings, recall information, and communicate more efficiently through real-time translation features.

news.title: Huawei's new smart watch features health monitoring technology
news.summary: Huawei has announced a new smart watch that includes advanced health monitoring features, such as heart rate tracking and sleep analysis.
news.content: Huawei's latest smart watch comes with a range of health monitoring features that utilize AI algorithms to provide detailed health insights. The watch includes a heart rate monitor, sleep analysis, and stress tracking, which are all powered by Huawei's TruSeen technology. The device also offers fitness tracking for various sports and activities, making it a comprehensive health and fitness companion.

news.title: Apple's M-series chips power new AI PC lineup
news.summary: Apple's M-series chips are at the core of the company's new lineup of AI PCs, offering enhanced performance and energy efficiency.
news.content: Apple has announced its new lineup of AI PCs, all of which are powered by the company's proprietary M-series chips. These chips are designed to deliver improved performance and energy efficiency, making them ideal for AI tasks. The new PCs are expected to offer better integration with Apple's ecosystem of devices and services, providing a seamless experience for users.

news.title: Rokid launches new AR glasses in competition with Meta and Apple
news.summary: Rokid, a Chinese AI company, has launched new AR glasses, positioning itself as a competitor to Meta and Apple in the wearables market.
news.content: Rokid has unveiled its latest AR glasses, which are designed to offer a more immersive and interactive experience compared to existing products from Meta and Apple. The glasses are powered by Rokid's own AI chip and offer features such as real-time translation, navigation, and hands-free control. The company aims to capture a significant share of the growing AR market with its innovative product.

news.title: Zephyr RTOS announces new version with improved security features
news.summary: The Zephyr Project has announced a new version of its RTOS, which includes enhanced security features and better support for IoT devices.
news.content: The Zephyr Project, a leading RTOS for the Internet of Things, has released a new version of its operating system. The update includes improved security features, such as stronger encryption and more robust protection against cyber threats. The new version also offers better support for IoT devices, enabling developers to create more connected and intelligent products.

news.title: Tuya Smart expands AI ecosystem with new API updates
news.summary: Tuya Smart has announced new API updates to its AI platform, enabling developers to create more integrated and intelligent IoT solutions.
news.content: Tuya Smart, a leading IoT platform, has released new API updates to its AI ecosystem. The updates allow developers to integrate more seamlessly with Tuya's platform, creating IoT solutions that are smarter and more responsive. The new APIs support a wider range of devices and offer more advanced AI capabilities, such as voice recognition and image analysis.

news.title: Amazon introduces new Echo devices with built-in AI capabilities
news.summary: Amazon has launched new Echo devices that come with built-in AI capabilities, enhancing the user experience with voice recognition and smart home control.
news.content: Amazon has introduced a new line of Echo devices that integrate AI capabilities, allowing users to control their smart homes more effectively. The devices feature voice recognition technology and can learn user preferences over time, providing a more personalized experience. The new Echo devices also support a wider range of smart home appliances, making them a central hub for home automation.
